title: Event: The Future of Work Management - 14th of November
excerpt:

:point_right:t3: SIGN UP HERE: The Future of Work Management - November 2024 …

posts.author: Julia.Palm.Omnitas (Julia Palm)
posts.cookedHtml:
Get ready to join Omnitas event in partnership with monday.com and Make, right in the buzzing heart of London on November 14th!

SIGN UP HERE: The Future of Work Management - November 2024 - Omnitas Consulting

This one-of-a-kind gathering is all about helping business professionals like you transform the way you work. Whether you’re looking to level up your processes or unlock game-changing insights, this is your chance to dive into solutions that will truly elevate your business.

Mark your calendar!
When – 14th of November, at 12:30 PM
Where – Menier Penthouse, 5th floor, 38 Southwark St, London Bridge, SE1 1UN

See you on the 14th of November!

posts.author: Julia.Palm.Omnitas (Julia Palm)
posts.cookedHtml: @Julietteb Hi! Could you please add this in the event calendar announcement?

posts.cookedHtml: Ahh sorry i was OOO and missed this! It is added !!!
